meta_title: Wigs & Hair Alternatives in Fresno | Studio One
meta_description: Private, luxury wig solutions in Fresno. Medical-grade options, consultations, and custom styling.
h1: Wigs & Medical Wig Solutions in Fresno, California
hero_subtitle: Private, Luxury, Natural-Looking Wig Experiences at Studio One Hair Design in partnership with Maven Mane & Co. Where Confidence Meets Compassion.

sections.heading: Your journey begins with a one-on-one appointment designed to be relaxed, informative, and empowering.
sections.body:
In our private fitting space, you'll receive comprehensive support:

A warm welcome and an open conversation - We discuss challenges, goals, and lifestyle to guide toward natural solutions.

A gentle scalp and density evaluation - Determines whether luxury, medical-grade wigs, or extensions best suit your needs.

Cap sizing and precise measurements - Ensures comfort and security for wig candidates.

Length, density, and style recommendations - Design a natural, effortless look true to you.

Overview of medical-grade options - Specialized solutions for women experiencing hair loss.

Insurance guidance - Many medical wigs can be covered with proper documentation through Maven Mane & Co.

Transparent next steps and timelines - Always know exactly what to expect.

sections.heading: How Our Partnership With Maven Mane & Co. Works
sections.body:
You get the best of both worlds: Studio One's artistry plus Maven Mane's medical-grade expertise.

Studio One Handles: Private consultation, cap sizing, wig fitting, custom blending, cutting, styling, color matching, and ongoing maintenance.

Maven Mane & Co. Handles: Manufacturing, construction, insurance processing, and structural repairs including lace replacements and knot repairs.

sections.heading: Our Wig Options & Who They're For
sections.body:
Each option designed to meet you exactly where you are in your hair journey.

Luxury Human Hair Wigs - For everyday wear, long-term confidence, and natural, seamless appearance.

Medical-Grade Wigs - Designed for medical-related hair loss such as chemotherapy, alopecia, PCOS, and trichotillomania.

Toppers & Partial Solutions - Perfect for early-stage thinning, part-line loss, or added fullness.

Custom-Blended Color Units - Colored, cut, and finished at Studio One for true-to-you final appearance.

sections.heading: What Makes Our Wigs Different
sections.body:
Your wig should look and feel like natural hair. Studio One delivers:

- Premium 100% real human hair
- Lifespan of up to 5 years with premium care
- Lightweight, breathable caps
- Soft, realistic lace fronts
- Natural movement
- Secure, comfortable fit
- Custom color, tone and blending
- Private, elevated experience tailored to you

sections.heading: Why Women Choose Studio One for Wig & Medical Wig Support
sections.body: Over 28 years of experience helping women restore confidence. Fresno and Clovis's go-to salon for natural-looking transformations with luxury private experience, seamless support, customized compassionate process, and medical-grade partnership with Maven Mane & Co.

sections.heading: Pricing & What Affects Cost
sections.body: Every woman's needs differ, affecting wig pricing based on: wig type (full, topper, medical-grade), length, density, color customization, cap construction, and insurance coverage (if eligible). Personalized quotes provided during consultation.

sections.heading: Wig Maintenance & Longevity Care at Studio One
sections.body:
Your wig is an investment in confidence; proper care protects that investment.

Studio One Provides: Wash and style appointments, deep conditioning, tone/gloss refresh, knot toning, seasonal care planning, at-home care education, and storage recommendations.

Handled by Maven Mane & Co.: Structural or construction needs including lace replacement, knot repairs, liner replacement, and cap adjustments.

faq_items.a: Yes. All units we work with are luxury, 100% human hair.

faq_items.q: Will people know I'm wearing a wig?
faq_items.a: No. With proper fit, blending, and color customization, your wig looks completely natural.

faq_items.q: How long does a medical wig last?
faq_items.a: With proper care, up to five years.
Yes. Your wig functions like natural hair.
Many clients qualify. Maven Mane & Co. will help process eligible insurance claims.
Yes. Toppers are available for partial thinning.

faq_items.q: What if my wig needs repairs?
faq_items.a: Studio One handles all maintenance. Structural repairs are sent to Maven Mane & Co.
